message:
fix(policy): bound unbounded approvals push in approval_workflow

record.approvals.push(signature) grew unbounded per proposal — an
attacker with multiple signer identities (dedup only prevents same
signer twice) could exhaust memory. Now capped at MAX_APPROVALS (256)
via push_bounded. All 33 approval_workflow tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
